forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 2am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 66. Southwest wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 2pm. Mostly sunny. High near 81, with temperatures falling to around 74 in the afternoon. West wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

weather_report:
As night gently envelops Boston, an almost ethereal quietness settles over the city, occasionally punctuated by the distant hum of traffic. In the hours to come, you may sense the soft caress of July’s warmth—tonight’s low gracefully holds at 66. Yet, watch for the whisper of rain that could mingle with the dawn, a mere 20% chance enough to cast a pitter-patter before it all clears. 

By midday, the clouds will lift, bringing forth a mostly sunny canvas that transforms the skyline into a vibrant tapestry. A flirtation with thunderstorms is on the horizon come afternoon, swirling in at about 50%. With the air temperature peaking at a balmy 81, it promises to be a day where comfort meets unpredictability. To navigate these shifting moods, a light, breathable ensemble will serve one well—think of a loose shirt and perhaps a light jacket for the morning chill that dissipates as the sun climbs higher. Given the somewhat volatile weather, indulge in a quiet stroll through one of Boston’s parks, a visit to your favorite café for a warm drink, or perhaps explore a local bookstore, letting the unfolding day guide your footsteps.
